title: hedysarum parviflorum
intro: Hedysarum parviflorum, also known as the small-flowered hedysarum or small-flowered sarsaparilla, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Hedysarum parviflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
